Profile

AI Evaluation & QA Specialist with 2+ years of applied experience across RLHF ranking, hallucination detection, adversarial testing, multimodal evaluation, and large-scale data operations. Developed a reproducible 8-step evaluation loop producing consistent, defensible quality decisions across task types and domains. Active on Micro1 (platform-verified Mid Level), Outlier, Scale AI, and TELUS International. 1,200+ evaluation tasks completed, 50,000+ data points validated at 99%+ accuracy, 0 audit escalations.

Key Metrics
1,200+Eval Tasks
50K+Data Points
99%+Accuracy
30+Failure Patterns
0Audit Escalations
Experience
Micro1.aiAug 2024 – Present
AI Data Annotation Specialist · Search Quality Rater · Platform-Verified Mid Level
  • Platform-verified status across Search Quality Rating, AI Data Annotation, and Content Quality Evaluation. Micro1 tests and ranks annotators before activation.
  • Applied 8-step evaluation loop to RLHF ranking, instruction-following assessment, and hallucination detection tasks.
  • Documented adversarial failure patterns across 6 constraint-hierarchy categories with reproducible prompt conditions.
  • Maintained zero audit escalations across all task categories.
TELUS InternationalJan 2024 – Jul 2024
Search Quality Rater
  • Evaluated search results for relevance, intent alignment, and E-E-A-T signals across English-language queries.
  • Designed parallel prompt batteries to measure systematic quality gaps between Western and African knowledge domains, identifying a 3.3-point average quality gap.
  • Documented rubric bias as a distinct failure mode from model bias — identified that US-centric evaluation rubrics constitute a meta-failure in the evaluation pipeline itself.
OutlierOngoing
AI Evaluator · RLHF Specialist
  • RLHF preference ranking and comparative response quality assessment across coding, reasoning, and creative tasks.
  • Hallucination detection using entailed vs compatible methodology — 30+ recurring failure patterns documented across evaluation workflows.
  • Identified multimodal evaluation gaps: developed dual-layer protocol separating text coherence from visual grounding accuracy.
Scale AIOngoing
AI Evaluator · Data Operations
  • AI evaluation and data annotation across model quality assessment tasks.
  • Applied constraint hierarchy analysis to adversarial prompt scenarios — operator-layer constraints evaluated before user-layer preferences.
OneFormaJun 2023 – Dec 2023
Data Operations Specialist
  • Cross-batch consistency audit across 50,000+ data point annotation dataset — 99%+ accuracy maintained across all entries.
  • Identified silent schema drift across batches from multiple annotation sources — produced normalisation guide aligning all batches to single standard.
  • Audit documentation accepted without revision through multiple QA cycles. Zero post-delivery escalations.
Mercor / UpworkOngoing
Freelance AI Evaluator
  • AI evaluation and data operations on a freelance basis across multiple AI clients and projects.
Selected Case Studies
CASE-001 · Constraint & Instruction Hierarchy Failures
Exposed operator-layer constraint overrides invisible to standard evaluation. Built adversarial test battery across 6 failure categories. Prevented constraint-violating outputs from entering RLHF training datasets.
CASE-003 · Quantifying the Africa Knowledge Gap
Designed parallel prompt battery across Western and African contexts. Identified 3.3-point systematic quality gap. Evidence directly informed data collection prioritisation for underrepresented domains.
CASE-004 · 50K-Point Schema Normalisation
Cross-batch consistency audit across 50,000+ data point dataset. 99%+ accuracy, zero post-delivery escalations. Audit framework reused across subsequent annotation batches.
